# INAZU (https://inazu.app)

> Your ride companion for bikes and cars.

## About

INAZU helps riders record GPS sessions, save ride recaps, manage a garage of bikes and cars, and view weekly progress. Available on the App Store for iPhone.

## Download

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/inazu/id6775971770

## Key pages

- Home: https://inazu.app/
- Privacy: https://inazu.app/privacy
- Terms: https://inazu.app/terms
- Support: https://inazu.app/support

## Contact

- hello@inazu.app
- support@inazu.app
